title: Chocolates Coffee Mug
description: Fun mod that adds a few things.
body:
### ABOUT 📖
Fun mod that adds stuff that I find funny, cool, or cursed. I know it seems clichie for an Amongus to be added, but we have got way more than that, this mod also includes new dimensions, biomes, and blocks, all to push the limits of my cursed creative mindset. So, If you want to jump in to this weirder cursed world, then download today, and make the biggest mistake you'll ever make. :)

### HIGHLIGHTS 🎉
Some of my favorite additions of the mod are the Chocolate biome, blocks, and items for sure! And sometimes, the _sussy_ looking mobs...

### REQUIREMENTS 📝
This mod does not require any dependencies or library mods to run(for now). Although most of the addidions are'nt supported for survival gameplay I do plan to add survival elements in the future.

### IMPORTANT 📕
If you would like to add this to your modpack, go ahead! I would love to see this mod interact with others. :)


[THIS MOD IS NOW DISCONTINUED]
